1.name: Bully 1
1.text: Well, well, well... If it isn't Perry...

3.name: Bully 2
3.text: Why? You off to get a nice breakfast, hoping to get some peace??

5.name: Colin
5.text: [font size=16]Uhm... hello? Are we all forgetting about me being here?[/font]

6.name: Bully 3
6.text: Nerds like you don't deserve [font size=26]ANY[/font] sort of peace in the real world!

7.name: Bully 4
7.text: Go back to burying your nose inside them books, neeeerd!

8.name: Colin
8.text: [font size=36]Hey![/font] Stop ignoring me, you jerks!

10.name: Colin
10.text: Excuse you?? * ouch... * Perhaps [font size=26]YOU'RE[/font] the small fries!

11.name: Colin
11.text: Getting off bullying kids who can't fight back. Pick someone your own size!

12.name: Colin
12.text: Oh right... You are doing that... HAHAHAHAHA! Small fries indeed, you lot!

13.name: Bully 2
13.text: You are asking to be [font size=26]beat[/font]!

15.name: Bully 1
15.text: Tsk... Leave them be... Let's go, boys. We're done here!

16.name: Bully 1
16.text: Have fun finding a place to sit, HAH!

17.name: Colin
17.text: These... guys... are... [font size=30]crazy![/font] These are steel chairs! While they slid easily, they were still quite heavy!

19.name: Colin
19.text: I'm sorry Ms. Barbara, we'll deal with this!
